---
pagetitle: "Positron"
toc: false
editor: source
anchor-links: false
description: |
  Positron unifies exploration and production work in one free, AI-assisted environment, empowering the full spectrum of data science in Python and R.
hide-description: true
image: images/positron-social.png
format:
  html:
    body-classes: positron-homepage
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <!-- Open Graph Meta Tags -->
          <meta property="og:title" content="Positron - The Data Science IDE">
          <meta property="og:description" content="Positron unifies exploration and production work in one free, AI-assisted environment, empowering the full spectrum of data science in Python and R.">
          <meta property="og:type" content="website">
          <meta property="og:url" content="https://positron.posit.co/">
          <meta property="og:image" content="https://positron.posit.co/images/index-positron-social-share.png">
          <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
          <meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
          <meta property="og:site_name" content="Positron">
          <meta property="og:locale" content="en_US">
---

<!-- ============================== HERO ============================== -->
<section class="hero-section">

<p class="hero-eyebrow">From <a href="https://posit.co/">Posit PBC</a>, the creators of RStudio</p>

<h1>The Data Science IDE</h1>

<p class="hero-subheadline">A free IDE with built-in AI for the full spectrum of data science in Python and R.</p>

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="download.qmd" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Download for Free</a>
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Explore Features</a>
</div>
<p class="hero-meta">Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux. No account required.</p>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Features</a>
<a href="release-notes.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Release Notes</a>
<a href="welcome.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Guides</a>
</div>
:::

<div class="hero-showcase">
<div class="hero-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Feature screenshots">
<button class="hero-tab active" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-controls="panel-data-explorer" id="tab-data-explorer" data-index="0">
<i class="bi bi-table"></i> Data Explorer
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-notebooks" id="tab-notebooks" data-index="1">
<i class="bi bi-journal-code"></i> Notebooks
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-ai-assistant" id="tab-ai-assistant" data-index="2">
<i class="bi bi-robot"></i> AI Assistant
</button>
<button class="hero-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-plots" id="tab-plots" data-index="3">
<i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Plots
</button>
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panels">
<div class="hero-tab-panel active" role="tabpanel" id="panel-data-explorer" aria-labelledby="tab-data-explorer">
<img src="images/data-explorer.png" alt="Positron Data Explorer showing a tabular data view with filtering and sorting capabilities" loading="eager">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-notebooks" aria-labelledby="tab-notebooks">
<img src="images/positron-notebook.png" alt="Positron Notebook interface for interactive data science workflows" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-ai-assistant" aria-labelledby="tab-ai-assistant">
<img src="images/positron-notebook-assistant-panel.png" alt="Positron AI Assistant panel providing contextual help for data science tasks" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="hero-tab-panel" role="tabpanel" id="panel-plots" aria-labelledby="tab-plots">
<img src="images/astropy.png" alt="Positron Plots pane showing an astronomical data visualization" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

</section>

<!-- ========================= VALUE PROPS ========================== -->
<section class="value-props-section">

<h2>Stop context-switching between tools</h2>

<div class="feature-showcase" data-showcase="workflow">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="workflow-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Integrated workflow</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Explore data, write code, and ship results, all without leaving your IDE. No more copying between notebooks and scripts or juggling separate tools for analysis and production.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Built-in Data Explorer</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="workflow-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Interactive plots</div>
</button>
</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="workflow-0">
<img src="images/positron-notebook.png" alt="Positron editor with code and inline output" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-1">
<img src="images/data-explorer.png" alt="Positron Data Explorer showing tabular data" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="workflow-2">
<img src="images/astropy.png" alt="Positron Plots pane with data visualization" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2>One IDE for both Python and R</h2>

<div class="feature-showcase" data-showcase="languages">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="languages-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Dual language support</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Stop juggling RStudio and VS Code. Positron gives both languages the same data explorer, variables pane, and plots viewer so you pick the best language for the job, not the one your IDE supports.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="languages-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Shared variables and data explorer</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="languages-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Switch interpreters on the fly</div>
</button>
</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="languages-0">
<img src="images/astropy.png" alt="Positron with a Python session and data visualization" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="languages-1">
<!-- TODO: Replace with variables pane screenshot showing both languages -->
<img src="images/variables-pane.png" alt="Positron variables pane with shared data" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="languages-2">
<!-- TODO: Replace with interpreter switcher screenshot -->
<img src="images/active-interpreter-session.png" alt="Positron interpreter selector" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

<h2>AI that actually understands your data</h2>

<div class="feature-showcase" data-showcase="ai">
<div class="feature-showcase-nav">
<button class="feature-nav-item active" data-target="ai-0">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Context awareness</div>
<div class="feature-nav-desc">Generic AI assistants don't know your variables, your data, or your session. Positron's AI sees your active dataframes, console output, and plots so it has the full context when making suggestions.</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="ai-1">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Notebook assistant</div>
</button>
<button class="feature-nav-item" data-target="ai-2">
<div class="feature-nav-title">Inline code generation</div>
</button>
</div>
<div class="feature-showcase-image">
<div class="feature-panel active" id="ai-0">
<img src="images/positron-notebook-assistant-panel.png" alt="Positron AI Assistant with data context" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="ai-1">
<!-- TODO: Replace with notebook assistant in action -->
<img src="images/positron-notebook-assistant-action-bar.png" alt="Positron notebook assistant action bar" loading="lazy">
</div>
<div class="feature-panel" id="ai-2">
<!-- TODO: Replace with inline AI code generation screenshot -->
<img src="images/positron-notebook.png" alt="Positron inline code generation" loading="lazy">
</div>
</div>
</div>

</section>

<!-- ======================== TESTIMONIALS ============================ -->
<section class="testimonials-section">

<h2>Hear from the community</h2>

<div class="testimonials-grid">

<div class="testimonial-card">
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">SP</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Sam Parmar</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Statistical Data Scientist, Pfizer</p>
</div>
</div>
<blockquote>"Positron feels like the perfect balance between VS Code and RStudio."</blockquote>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">MH</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Meghan S. Harris</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Data Scientist, Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center</p>
</div>
</div>
<blockquote>"Positron didn't just make Python accessible, it made it fun."</blockquote>
</div>

<div class="testimonial-card">
<div class="testimonial-header">
<div class="testimonial-avatar">YR</div>
<div class="testimonial-author">
<p class="testimonial-name">Yanan Ren</p>
<p class="testimonial-role">Senior Statistician, Medtronic</p>
</div>
</div>
<blockquote>"The combination of Positron and the AI Assistant makes switching between R &amp; Python incredibly smooth."</blockquote>
</div>

</div>

</section>

<!-- ========================== SUPADEMO ============================= -->
::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<section class="supademo-section">

<h2>See it in action</h2>

<p class="supademo-description">Take an interactive tour of Positron's key features and see how it streamlines your data science workflow.</p>

<div class="supademo-container" id="supademo-container">
<div class="supademo-preview" id="supademo-preview" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Launch interactive tour">
<img src="images/data-explorer.png" alt="Click to launch interactive Positron tour" loading="lazy">
<div class="supademo-play-overlay">
<i class="bi bi-play-circle-fill"></i>
<span>Launch Interactive Tour</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  var preview = document.getElementById('supademo-preview');
  var container = document.getElementById('supademo-container');
  function launch() {
    var iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
    iframe.src = 'https://app.supademo.com/embed/cmmv03fu40k72en0y2v94hkzu?embed_v=2';
    iframe.allow = 'clipboard-write';
    iframe.frameBorder = '0';
    iframe.allowFullscreen = true;
    iframe.style.width = '100%';
    iframe.style.height = '100%';
    iframe.style.position = 'absolute';
    iframe.style.top = '0';
    iframe.style.left = '0';
    container.innerHTML = '';
    container.style.position = 'relative';
    container.style.paddingBottom = '62.5%';
    container.appendChild(iframe);
  }
  if (preview) {
    preview.addEventListener('click', launch);
    preview.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); launch(); }
    });
  }
})();
</script>

</section>
:::

<!-- ============================== FAQ =============================== -->
<section class="faq-section">

<h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>

<div class="faq-accordion">

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>Is Positron free?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">

Yes! Positron is free to download and use. It is source-available under the [Elastic License 2.0](https://github.com/posit-dev/positron?tab=License-1-ov-file#readme).

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
Learn more about [what this license means](licensing.qmd) and our decision to use it.
:::

</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>Can I use my VS Code extensions?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
Yes! Positron supports VS Code compatible extensions (.vsix files), giving you access to thousands of community extensions out of the box. By building on Code OSS, Positron gets rich text editor capabilities and broad extensibility beyond the core IDE. <a href="extensions.qmd">Read more about using extensions with Positron</a>.
</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>Is RStudio going away?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
No. Posit is committed to maintaining and updating RStudio. RStudio is very mature, stable software, and will continue to receive security updates, stability improvements, and priority bug fixes. If you're new to R, we recommend starting with Positron — but if you're happy with RStudio, you can continue using it.
</div>
</details>

<details class="faq-item">
<summary>How is Positron different from RStudio or VS Code?</summary>
<div class="faq-answer">
Positron combines the best of both worlds: the data-science-first experience of RStudio — with a built-in data explorer, variables pane, and plots viewer — and the modern editor capabilities of VS Code, including extensions, AI assistance, and multi-language support.
</div>
</details>

</div>

<p class="faq-more"><a href="faqs.qmd">View all frequently asked questions →</a></p>

</section>

<!-- ========================== CLOSING CTA =========================== -->
<section class="closing-cta-section">

<h2>Ready to get started?</h2>

<p class="closing-cta-description">Download Positron for free and start building with Python and R today.</p>

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="download.qmd" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Download for Free</a>
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Explore Features</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="workbench"}
<div class="hero-ctas">
<a href="features.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Features</a>
<a href="release-notes.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Release Notes</a>
<a href="welcome.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg">Guides</a>
</div>
:::

</section>

<!-- ========================= LICENSE NOTE =========================== -->
::: {.content-visible unless-profile="workbench"}
<p class="license-note">
Positron™ is licensed under the <a href="https://github.com/posit-dev/positron?tab=License-1-ov-file#readme">Elastic License 2.0</a>, a source-available license. <a href="licensing.qmd">Read more</a> about what this license means and our decision to use it.
</p>
:::

<!-- ========================= TAB SCRIPT ============================ -->
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Hero tabs
  var heroTabs = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-tab');
  var heroPanels = document.querySelectorAll('.hero-tab-panel');

  heroTabs.forEach(function(tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
      heroTabs.forEach(function(t) {
        t.classList.remove('active');
        t.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      });
      heroPanels.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
      tab.classList.add('active');
      tab.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
      document.getElementById(tab.getAttribute('aria-controls')).classList.add('active');
    });

    tab.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
      var index = parseInt(tab.getAttribute('data-index'));
      var newIndex = -1;
      if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') newIndex = (index + 1) % heroTabs.length;
      if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') newIndex = (index - 1 + heroTabs.length) % heroTabs.length;
      if (newIndex >= 0) { e.preventDefault(); heroTabs[newIndex].click(); heroTabs[newIndex].focus(); }
    });
  });

  // Feature showcase tabs
  document.querySelectorAll('.feature-showcase').forEach(function(showcase) {
    var navItems = showcase.querySelectorAll('.feature-nav-item');
    var panels = showcase.querySelectorAll('.feature-panel');

    navItems.forEach(function(item) {
      item.addEventListener('click', function() {
        navItems.forEach(function(n) { n.classList.remove('active'); });
        panels.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
        item.classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById(item.getAttribute('data-target')).classList.add('active');
      });
    });
  });
});
</script>
